title: Trendy Queen Womens Long Sleeve Shirts Basic
textarea:
Material - This long sleeve shirt is made of 88% polyester,12% spandex. Llight weight, super soft and high-stretch fabric with a second-skin feel
Design - Cropped and stretch fitted style,crew neck, tight underscrubs layer,you can wear it regularly or fold it up like a crop top,cute,slim fit,casual y2k style fashion
Occasion - Simple and stylish top,great for going out,wort out,running,gym,yoga,daily wear, streetwear,rave party,club,dating,beach,travel, vacation,shopping,etc.
Stylish Wearing - This basic shirt is a must-have for spring,fall and winter, perfect wear with cargo pants,shorts, jeans,skirt,cardigan,hoodie,sweater and jacket for a fashion y2k look
